ab: mnwah myan mkal mama mu shera sami ki yaba mu.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: cyux tqlisan kakay nya mama mu.
kmal qu hiya mha, cyux mbling qu namuw na ngasal ma.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: trang musa kbalay qu hiya ga, mhutaw kahul namuw.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: s’aras hi kacing ru pinro na yaba mu bbiq nya mama mu.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: mcisal sami zik ngasal ki mama mu, piyux balay pinqzyuwaw wal nya spinqzyu.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: mshriq sami ga, strahu saku nya mha wagiq su la, blaq balay inkyasan su.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: kyalun maku mha, blaq kakay su lga, wahay misu mita loziy.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, \"When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.\"
